name: Sesame Tahini Oat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (amaranth seeds, oat flakes, flour, baking powder, and cinnamon) in one bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine milk or water, honey, and sesame tahini.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Add chopped nuts and raisins if using.
5. Scoop spoonfuls of dough onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "COOKIES" tri-fold
